title: Rust: lichen-ipv6 error types duplicated from lichen-core
description:
The TooShort and BufferTooSmall error types are now defined in rust/lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs (lines 23-59) and re-exported from rust/lichen-core/src/error.rs:

    // lichen-core/src/error.rs
    pub use lichen_ipv6::{BufferTooSmall, TooShort};

This creates a dependency where lichen-core depends on lichen-ipv6 for error types. While this consolidates the definitions, it may create circular dependency issues if lichen-ipv6 ever needs types from lichen-core.

Location: rust/lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs:23-59, rust/lichen-core/src/error.rs
Risk: Low - architecture concern rather than bug.
Fix: Document the dependency direction; ensure lichen-ipv6 remains a leaf crate.
close_reason: Architecture concern documented - lichen-ipv6 remains a leaf crate, dependency direction is intentional
